Azure.ResourceManager.ResourceProvisioni.description: The provisioning state of a resource type.

BatchingPolicy.description: Base properties for batching policy configuration

values.name: minCountMaxDelay
values.description: Min count max delay batching policy

providerNamespace.description: The provider namespace populated by caller

appId.description: The application ID (GUID format) extracted from request, checked against manifest

Destination.description: Destination resource for Azure Resource Notifications

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

DestinationListResult.description: The response of a Destination list operation.

value.description: The Destination items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

values.name: enableInitialSnapshot
values.description: Enables delivery of the initial snapshot

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation

EndpointDeliveryMode.description: The delivery mode for endpoints, determining how notifications are distributed across endpoints

values.name: failover
values.description: Delivers to the first available endpoint

outputSchema.description: The output schema - readonly for now, will provide a way for 1P to set to fabric1P

outputEncoding.description: The output encoding - readonly and not configurable

GetNotificationSessionDetails.description: Session details for connecting to a notification session

id.description: The resource ID of the session

validUntil.description: Timestamp until which the session details are valid

GetSessionDetailsRequest.description: Request body for getting session details

durationInMinutes.description: Duration in minutes for session validity

MinCountMaxDelayBatchingPolicy.description: Min count max delay batching policy

maxDelay.description: Maximum delay in ISO 8601 duration format (e.g., PT5M for 5 minutes)

NotificationSessionConnectionDetails.description: Connection details for a notification session

status.description: The status of the notification session

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource

notificationSessionId.description: Unique identifier of the notification session.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

NotificationSessionResourceListResult.description: The response of a NotificationSessionResource list operation.

value.description: The NotificationSessionResource items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

values.name: Accepted
values.description: The resource create request has been accepted

ResourceSubscription.description: Resource subscription for Azure Resource Notifications

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ResourceSubscriptionListResult.description: The response of a ResourceSubscription list operation.

value.description: The ResourceSubscription items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

query.description: The query to execute - only one table can be targeted at a time

scope.description: The scope for the execution of the filter

partitioningConfiguration.description: Defines how to partition the event stream. Supported kind: arnLocation

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation

ResourceSubscriptionUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the ResourceSubscription.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ResourceSubscriptionUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the ResourceSubscription.

query.description: The query to execute - only one table can be targeted at a time

ScopeKind.description: The kind of scope for resource subscriptions, determining how notifications are scoped and delivered

partitions.description: Which partitions go to this destination

pathPolicy.description: Incoming notifications are mapped to a path based on the path policy

batchingPolicy.description: Notifications for the same path are batched following the batching policy

outputSchema.description: The schema to use for the delivered notifications - read-only, must be "firstParty" for now

outputEncoding.description: Format for the output - read-only, must be "parquet" for now

endpointContainer.description: Storage container to store the data

endpointDeliveryMode.description: How to deliver to the endpoints below

values.name: enableDeltas
values.description: Enables delivery of writes and deletes

tenantId.description: The tenant ID populated by API after validation (from Aux token)

servicePrincipal.description: The service principal populated by API after validation (from Aux token)

TimeAndScopeRangeHashPathPolicy.description: Time and scope range hash path policy

timeSource.description:
The source of time used for partitioning and hashing.
Typical values include "eventTime" (use the event timestamp) and "systemTime" (use the ingestion/processing time).

scope.description: The logical scope used for hashing into buckets, for example "tenant", "subscription", or "resourceGroup".

scopeBuckets.description: The number of scope buckets to hash the chosen scope into.

pathTemplate.description:
The path template string with variable placeholders that will be resolved at runtime, following the pattern:
year={yyyy},month={mm},day={dd}/hour={hh}/tenantBucket={scopeBucket}.
Placeholders such as {yyyy}, {mm}, {dd}, {hh}, and {scopeBucket} are replaced with the corresponding values.
